kinPerPersonYear.description: Kin issued per person-year of presence. This is a unit definition — 1 kin = 1/10,000 person-year — not a policy choice. All human years are valued equally.

universalFloorGuaranteed.description: Every member receives basic needs support unconditionally.

membershipUnconditional.description: Belonging is not contingent on productive capacity.

dataPortabilityGuaranteed.description: Members can always take their data and leave.

ledgerTransparent.description: All kin flows are visible to all members.

democraticMinimumProtected.description: Governance cannot be captured by any individual or group.

dueProcessGuaranteed.description: No member may have their membership suspended, revoked, or materially restricted without notice, a stated reason, and an opportunity to respond before the decision takes effect.

noExPostFacto.description: No rule change may be applied retroactively to penalise conduct that was permitted at the time it occurred.

rightOfAppeal.description: Any member subject to an adverse governance decision has the right to appeal it to an independent body before it takes permanent effect.

thresholdSimpleMajority.description: Fraction of total members required to pass a simple majority proposal.

thresholdSupermajority.description: Fraction of total members required to pass a supermajority proposal.

thresholdNearConsensus.description: Fraction of total members required to pass a near-consensus proposal.

deliberationPeriodDays.description: Minimum days before a proposal vote can close.

bankDemurrageRate.description: Monthly rate at which the Central Bank applies demurrage to recover unanchored kin.

demurrageFloor.description: Balance floor below which no demurrage is charged. Only the portion of an account balance above this threshold is subject to the levy or bank demurrage. Expressed in kin. Protects small balances — roughly one month of person-year income — from being eroded.

retirementAge.description: Age at which a member becomes eligible for monthly retirement payments from the social insurance pool.

retirementPayoutRate.description: Fraction of the retirement pool distributed each month across all current retirees. E.g. 0.005 = 0.5% of pool per month.

birthdayCirculationFraction.description: Fraction of each birthday person-year issuance paid directly to the member's primary account as circulating kin. The remainder goes to the retirement pool. E.g. 0.1 = 10% direct, 90% to pool.

communityBudget.description: Kin minted directly into the Commonwealth account each month as a community savings injection. Provides starting liquidity for public employment before demurrage collections build up.

communityEndowment.description: Kin minted per new member as a community liquidity endowment. 49,000 goes to the Commonwealth, 1,000 to the member's primary account. Burned when the member departs. Total rises and falls with population.

authorityMap.description: Admitting a new member to the community
Splitting a multi-domain council into two
Declaring a domain emergency (assembly ratifies within 72h)
Enacting an operating rule within a domain
